x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service contracts (sn_pss_core_service_contract) link customer cases to contracted service levels. Now Assist CSM uses contract data for personalized AI service delivery and entitlement-aware responses.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure service contracts via sn_pss_core_service_contract_list.do. Link contracts to customer accounts. Target: 5+ active service contracts. Now Assist CSM uses contract data for AI-personalized service delivery.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Service contracts (sn_pss_core_service_contract) link customer cases to contracted service levels. Now Assist CSM uses contract data for personalized AI service delivery and entitlement-aware responses.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSM Entitlement Contracts</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    if (!gs.tableExists('sn_pss_core_service_contract')) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'sn_pss_core_service_contract not found', finding: 'Customer Contracts and Entitlements (sn_pss_core) is not installed. Entitlement contract check is not applicable.' };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_pss_core_service_contract');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + ' active service contracts';
    if (count >= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + ' active service contracts. Now Assist CSM can provide entitlement-aware AI responses tailored to each customer\'s service agreement.' };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active service contract(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist CSM entitlement-aware AI personalization will have limited coverage.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'No active service contracts. Now Assist CSM cannot provide entitlement-aware personalized AI responses without contract data.' };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CSM</module><number>CHK0000422</number><order>100</order><remediation_guidance>Configure service contracts via sn_pss_core_service_contract_list.do. Link contracts to customer accounts. Target: 5+ active service contracts. Now Assist CSM uses contract data for AI-personalized service delivery.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSM Entitlement Contracts</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
